title: cvs.audit.jsErrors — in package.json but not in catalog
description: 'cvs.audit.jsErrors' is contributed in package.json (visible in command palette) but absent from catalog.ts — users cannot find it via the launcher
fixHint: Add an entry for 'cvs.audit.jsErrors' to CATALOG in catalog.ts, or add it to the EXEMPT set in this test if intentionally omitted.
